category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Sri Lanka market (SLSI conformity certification, SLS mark, SLS standards adopting IEC/EN, EN 149 FFP performance route).

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入斯里兰卡（SLSI）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入斯里蘭卡（SLSI）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Sri Lanka market requirements: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) conformity certification and import inspection, the SLS mark, SLS standards adopting IEC/EN (EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Department of Labour occupational-safety framework, and the medical-mask route via the national health regulator. Colombo is the principal port of entry.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与斯里兰卡市场要求对照，涵盖斯里兰卡标准协会（SLSI）合格认证与进口检验、SLS标志、采纳IEC/EN的SLS标准（EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、劳工部职业安全框架，以及经国家卫生监管机构的医用口罩路径。科伦坡为主要入境口岸。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與斯里蘭卡市場要求對照，涵蓋斯里蘭卡標準協會（SLSI）合格認證與進口檢驗、SLS標誌、採納IEC/EN的SLS標準（EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、勞工部職業安全框架，以及經國家衛生監管機構的醫用口罩路徑。科倫坡為主要入境口岸。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Sri Lanka law, SLSI conformity and import-inspection scope, applicable SLS/EN standards, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡法律、SLSI合格认证及进口检验范围、适用的SLS/EN标准及目的地国执法实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡法律、SLSI合格認證及進口檢驗範圍、適用的SLS/EN標準及目的地國執法實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP filtering respirators entering Sri Lanka are handled through the Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI), which operates conformity certification and import inspection and licenses the SLS mark; SLS standards commonly adopt IEC/EN, so the EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3 performance route is the practical reference. Occupational use sits under the Department of Labour framework, and medical/surgical masks are routed through the national health regulator. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) and GB 19083 test reports do not by themselves satisfy SLSI conformity — a local importer of record and SLSI assessment are required, and grid voltage differs (230 V, 50 Hz vs China 220/380 V, 50 Hz) which is relevant only for any powered accessories.
answer_first.zh: 进入斯里兰卡的FFP过滤式呼吸器经由斯里兰卡标准协会（SLSI）处理，SLSI实施合格认证与进口检验并授予SLS标志；SLS标准通常采纳IEC/EN，因此EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3性能路径为实务参照。职业用途归属劳工部框架，医用/外科口罩则经国家卫生监管机构。中国KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083检测报告本身不满足SLSI合格认证——须有当地进口商作为记录责任方并接受SLSI评估，且电网电压不同（230 V、50 Hz，对比中国220/380 V、50 Hz），此差异仅与任何带电配件相关。
answer_first.zht: 進入斯里蘭卡的FFP過濾式呼吸器經由斯里蘭卡標準協會（SLSI）處理，SLSI實施合格認證與進口檢驗並授予SLS標誌；SLS標準通常採納IEC/EN，因此EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3性能路徑為實務參照。職業用途歸屬勞工部框架，醫用/外科口罩則經國家衛生監管機構。中國KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083檢測報告本身不滿足SLSI合格認證——須有當地進口商作為記錄責任方並接受SLSI評估，且電網電壓不同（230 V、50 Hz，對比中國220/380 V、50 Hz），此差異僅與任何帶電配件相關。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (SLSI, SLS, Department of Labour, national health regulator) are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
